assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment and parses the ISO 8601 value
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 9 and 13 show the step checked security-matrix.md and extracted 'Last-Updated timestamp: 2026-05-01T10:00:00Z', which is a correctly parsed ISO 8601 value. The timestamp is displayed verbatim in ISO 8601 format for both streams.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 detects that the matrix is older than the 14-day default threshold and displays a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 16-17 show 'Threshold: 14 days' and 'Status: STALE' for stream 2.1.x. The age is computed as 62 days which exceeds 14. A WARNING block is displayed on lines 19-24. Same pattern repeats for stream 2.2.x on lines 30-38.

assertion_results.text: The staleness warning includes the stream name, the last-updated date, and the number of days since the last update
assertion_results.evidence: Line 19: 'Security matrix for stream **2.1.x** was last updated on 2026-05-01 (62 days ago).' contains the stream name (2.1.x), last-updated date (2026-05-01), and days since update (62 days ago). Line 34 shows the same for stream 2.2.x.

assertion_results.text: The warning presents three options: refresh now (re-run setup Step 10.6), proceed anyway, or stop
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 21-24 list three options: '1. Refresh now -- re-run matrix population (setup Step 10.6) for this stream', '2. Proceed anyway -- continue triage with the current matrix', '3. Stop -- halt triage so I can investigate'. All three required options are present with the Step 10.6 reference.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 runs before Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization) — no Jira operations are attempted before the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: Line 9 states 'before proceeding to Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization)'. Line 43 explicitly confirms: 'No Jira operations have been performed -- Step 0.3 runs before Step 0.5.' The output awaits user selection before any further steps.
